mapper.select: select seaf.id as id, seaf.id as rowId, seaf.sys_type as sysType, case when seaf.sys_type=1 then '科研' when seaf.sys_type=2 then '教学' else '' END as sysTypeName, seaf.sys_module_id as sysModuleId, smodule.name as sysModuleName, seaf.eaf_main_id as eafMainId, seafmain.name as eafMainName from cf_srm_eaf_flow seaf left join ct_srm_system_module smodule on smodule.code=seaf.sys_module_id left join cf_srm_eaf_main seafmain on seafmain.id=seaf.eaf_main_id
